title: Villager Trading Plus
description: Trade with Villagers faster - a port of Easier Villager Trading to modern versions.
body: This mod allows for trading with Villagers with just one click. It's great for quickly trading entire double chests of crops to farmers, or Paper to librarians. Villager Trading Plus works clientside, and does not need to be installed on the server. Some servers may view it as a cheat and block its behaviour. There's nothing I can do about this, all servers have their own rules. You can trade normally by holding down Ctrl. ## Installation Villager Trading Plus is a completely clientside mod for Fabric and NeoForge. - On Fabric, [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) is required. - On NeoForge, no dependencies are required. - Since v1.3, Mod settings are available with [McQoy](https://modrinth.com/mod/mcqoy). Older versions require [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config). ## Credits This is a port of Giselbaer's Easier Villager Trading to 1.21.x, allowing for the mod to be used on both loaders. Easier Villager Trading is available under the [MIT License](https://github.com/gbl/EasierVillagerTrading/blob/fabric_1_20/LICENSE). Mod Menu/Cloth Config integration in older versions of the mod is based on the integration present in [idwtialsimmoedm](https://modrinth.com/mod/idwtialsimmoedm) under its [MIT License](https://github.com/gliscowo/idwtialsimmoedm/blob/1.21/LICENSE).
